case_title: HICKEY, STEVEN CURTIS et al VS HYATT REGENCY SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HICKEY, STEVEN CURTIS HICKEY, ANGELA AS TO DEFENDANT HYATT REGENCY SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-19-1995 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HICKEY, STEVEN CURTIS HICKEY, ANGELA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HYATT REGENCY SAN FRANCISCO $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $515.00, COURT'S DECISION IS BASED ON TAYLOR VS FORTE HOTELS INTERNATIONAL (1991) 235 CA 3D 1119. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CORRESPONDENCE FROM AUGUSTINE LEE OF HYATT REGENCY S.F. TO COMM. KAPLAN FILED.
